creator: james.a.mcguire01@virgin.net
text: What an atrocious way to handle a bug.  6 years after reporting the issue no action is taken.  It would have taken you 5 minutes to deploy the software and test the behaviour which I reported.  Instead after 6 years you just sweep the issue under the rug like it never existed.  Tell me, why should I waste my time reporting anything in the future.
